name: MCC Meili Cloud Computing Industry Investment Co., Ltd.
summary: MCC Meili Cloud Computing Industry Investment Co., Ltd. produces and sells paper products in China. The company offers cultural paper products, such as double-adhesive paper under the Miliyun brand, electrostatic copy paper under the Feng Yanglan brand, and offset and anti-myopia paper; color paper products, including offset, copy, cardboard, pearlescent, embossed base, silk cotton, and other paper, as well as fluorescent and ordinary business stickers; and corrugated, textured, and offset printing paper. It also provides cloud computing services. The company was formerly known as MCC Meili Paper Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to MCC Meili Cloud Computing Industry Investment Co., Ltd. in July 2016. MCC Meili Cloud Computing Industry Investment Co., Ltd. is based in Zhongwei, China.
